articles.description: At the Apple event, the new iPhone series was introduced with its features and price. So how many BTC does it take to buy every new iPhone? Continue Reading: iPhone 15 Unveiled: Incredible Change in the Amount of Bitcoin Needed to Buy a New iPhone

articles.title: Solana is coming to MetaMask thanks to Snaps
articles.description: Before MetaMask Snaps, functionality that offers wider wallet customization, Metamask was primarily an EVM-based platform

articles.title: MetaMask to be usable outside the EVM ecosystem with Snaps launch
articles.description: MetaMask announced a new software mechanism called Snaps to expand its use on non-EVM blockchains including Cosmos, Solana, Tezos, Starknet and Algorand, among others.

articles.title: Replacing the Coordinator with a Validator Committee
articles.description: We are upgrading the current Coordinator to a decentralized Validator Committee. This change means that the placement of milestones will no longer rely solely on a single Coordinator managed by the IOTA Foundation.

articles.title: Solana: Why impending danger could be a blessing in disguise for SOL
articles.description: The FUD around SOL heightened as FTX prepares to liquidate its holdings. However, some participants consider the declining price as an opportunity to accumulate. Does on-chain data agree?
